thought.text: It seems I need to sign up for a weather API service first. Let me try using a different approach that doesn't require an API key.

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "curl -s \"https://wttr.in/Burbank,IL?format=j\"", "security_risk": "MEDIUM", "summary": "Querying weather for Burbank, IL using wttr.in"}
